prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `5adee1b2`.
codex_response:
`5adee1b2` is implemented. The rule is: the two bottom-left `2x2` legend blocks map object colors to frame colors, and every non-legend connected component of those object colors gets its one-cell outer ring plus all bounding-box background cells connected to the bbox boundary painted in the mapped color, while enclosed holes and the original object cells stay unchanged.

The Opus hint was only partially usable and I corrected it; the Sonnet file had no entry. I recorded that in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5adee1b2/notes.md#L1). No new reusable primitive was needed.

Validation passed end to end: `3/3` official examples, `1000/1000` generated examples, and the shared builder produced the task artifacts. I also spot-checked [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5adee1b2/previews/preview_01.png) in a terminal render; the outputs stay in-family with bottom-left legends, square `20-26` grids, and official-style `5x5`/`5x4` motifs.
